summary.en: PV inverters connected to the Japanese low-voltage or high-voltage grid must obtain JET (Japan Electrical Safety & Environment Technology Laboratories) grid-interconnection certification. JET certification verifies compliance with the Grid-Interconnection Code (JEAC 9701) and relevant technical requirements before market entry.
summary.zh: 接入日本低压或高压电网的光伏逆变器，须取得JET（日本电气安全环境研究所）并网认证。JET认证在产品入市前验证其符合电网连系规程（JEAC 9701）及相关技术要求。
summary.zht: 接入日本低壓或高壓電網的光伏逆變器，須取得JET（日本電氣安全環境研究所）併網認證。JET認證在產品入市前驗證其符合電網連系規程（JEAC 9701）及相關技術要求。

standards_or_laws: JEAC 9701 (電力品質確保に係る系統連系技術要件ガイドライン)

summary.en: In China, grid-tied PV inverters are certified under GB/T 19964 (Technical Requirements for Connecting PV Power Station to Power System) and related NB/T standards. Certification is conducted by CNAS-accredited labs; there is no direct equivalent to JET's independent third-party scheme.
summary.zh: 中国并网光伏逆变器依据GB/T 19964（光伏发电站接入电力系统技术规定）及相关NB/T标准进行认证，由CNAS认可实验室执行，无JET独立第三方认证的直接对等体系。
summary.zht: 中國併網光伏逆變器依據GB/T 19964（光伏發電站接入電力系統技術規定）及相關NB/T標準進行認證，由CNAS認可實驗室執行，無JET獨立第三方認證的直接對等體系。

gap.en: Japan does not recognise Chinese GB/T certifications or CGC test reports. Manufacturers must undergo a separate JET certification process in Japan. This requires re-testing at a JET-approved laboratory and submission of Japanese-language technical documentation. Lead time is typically 3–6 months.
gap.zh: 日本不承认中国GB/T认证或CGC检测报告，制造商须在日本另行进行JET认证流程，包括在JET认可实验室重新测试及提交日文技术文件，周期通常为3至6个月。
gap.zht: 日本不承認中國GB/T認證或CGC檢測報告，製造商須在日本另行進行JET認證流程，包括在JET認可實驗室重新測試及提交日文技術文件，周期通常為3至6個月。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory — required by the Electricity Business Act for grid connection
mandatory_status.cn: Mandatory for domestic grid connection under GB/T 19964; not accepted in Japan

source.publisher: JET (Japan Electrical Safety & Environment Technology Laboratories)

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Chinese GB/T 19964 certification is not accepted for Japanese grid connection. A separate JET certification is mandatory. Budget 3–6 months and engage a JET-registered test laboratory early.
compliance_verdict.zh: 【仅供参考】中国GB/T 19964认证不被日本并网所接受，必须另行取得JET认证。建议预留3至6个月周期，并提前联系JET注册测试实验室。
compliance_verdict.zht: 【僅供參考】中國GB/T 19964認證不被日本併網所接受，必須另行取得JET認證。建議預留3至6個月周期，並提前聯繫JET註冊測試實驗室。

requirement_topic.en: Dual Frequency Support: 50 Hz (East Japan) and 60 Hz (West Japan)
requirement_topic.zh: 双频率支持：东日本50 Hz与西日本60 Hz
requirement_topic.zht: 雙頻率支援：東日本50 Hz與西日本60 Hz

summary.en: Japan operates two separate grid frequency zones: 50 Hz in Eastern Japan (Tokyo area and north) and 60 Hz in Western Japan (Nagoya area and west). A PV inverter must support the correct frequency for its installation region, or be certified for both if sold nationally. JEAC 9701 specifies the permissible frequency deviation bands and reconnection conditions for each zone.
summary.zh: 日本电网分为两个独立频率区：东日本（东京及以北）为50 Hz，西日本（名古屋及以西）为60 Hz。光伏逆变器须支持安装地区对应频率，若全国销售则须获得双频认证。JEAC 9701规定了各区的允许频率偏差范围及重合闸条件。
summary.zht: 日本電網分為兩個獨立頻率區：東日本（東京及以北）為50 Hz，西日本（名古屋及以西）為60 Hz。光伏逆變器須支援安裝地區對應頻率，若全國銷售則須獲得雙頻認證。JEAC 9701規定了各區的允許頻率偏差範圍及重合閘條件。

standards_or_laws: 電力品質確保に係る系統連系技術要件ガイドライン (METI)

summary.en: China operates a unified 50 Hz grid nationwide. Chinese PV inverters are designed and tested exclusively for 50 Hz operation. No dual-frequency requirement exists under GB/T 19964 or related standards.
summary.zh: 中国全国电网统一采用50 Hz。中国光伏逆变器设计和测试均针对50 Hz，GB/T 19964及相关标准无双频要求。
summary.zht: 中國全國電網統一採用50 Hz。中國光伏逆變器設計和測試均針對50 Hz，GB/T 19964及相關標準無雙頻要求。

gap.en: Chinese inverters are typically 50 Hz-only. For the Western Japan market (60 Hz), hardware and firmware modifications are required, followed by a new or extended JET certification test. Selling a single SKU nationally in Japan requires dual-frequency design and dual-frequency JET certification — a significant engineering and certification cost not encountered in the Chinese domestic market.
gap.zh: 中国逆变器通常仅支持50 Hz。进入西日本市场（60 Hz）需进行硬件及固件改造，并重新或扩展JET认证测试。在日本全国销售单一型号需具备双频设计及双频JET认证，这是中国国内市场不存在的额外工程与认证成本。
gap.zht: 中國逆變器通常僅支援50 Hz。進入西日本市場（60 Hz）需進行硬體及韌體改造，並重新或擴展JET認證測試。在日本全國銷售單一型號需具備雙頻設計及雙頻JET認證，這是中國國內市場不存在的額外工程與認證成本。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory — inverter must match the grid frequency of the installation region; dual-frequency required for national sales
mandatory_status.cn: Not applicable — China is 50 Hz only; no dual-frequency requirement

source.publisher: METI (Ministry of Economy, Trade and Industry, Japan)

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Chinese 50 Hz-only inverters cannot be installed in the 60 Hz Western Japan zone without hardware/firmware modification and re-certification. For nationwide Japan distribution, dual-frequency design and JET dual-frequency certification are required from the outset.
compliance_verdict.zh: 【仅供参考】中国50 Hz专用逆变器未经硬件/固件改造及重新认证，不得安装于西日本60 Hz区域。如需在日本全国销售，须从产品设计阶段起即采用双频设计并取得JET双频认证。
compliance_verdict.zht: 【僅供參考】中國50 Hz專用逆變器未經硬體/韌體改造及重新認證，不得安裝於西日本60 Hz區域。如需在日本全國銷售，須從產品設計階段起即採用雙頻設計並取得JET雙頻認證。

requirement_topic.en: Anti-Islanding Protection: Active and Passive Methods (能動的・受動的方式)
requirement_topic.zh: 防孤岛保护：主动式与被动式（能動的・受動的方式）
requirement_topic.zht: 防孤島保護：主動式與被動式（能動的・受動的方式）

summary.en: JEAC 9701 requires PV inverters to implement both active (能動的) and passive (受動的) anti-islanding detection methods. Passive methods detect abnormal voltage or frequency deviations; active methods inject a perturbation signal to detect loss-of-mains. The combination is mandated to prevent islanding operation that could endanger utility workers during a grid outage. Specific detection thresholds and response times are defined in JEAC 9701.
summary.zh: JEAC 9701要求光伏逆变器同时采用主动式（能動的）与被动式（受動的）防孤岛检测方法。被动式检测电压或频率异常偏差；主动式注入扰动信号以检测电网失电。两者组合使用，旨在防止电网停电时发生孤岛运行，保障电力工作人员安全。JEAC 9701规定了具体检测阈值和响应时间。
summary.zht: JEAC 9701要求光伏逆變器同時採用主動式（能動的）與被動式（受動的）防孤島檢測方法。被動式檢測電壓或頻率異常偏差；主動式注入擾動信號以檢測電網失電。兩者組合使用，旨在防止電網停電時發生孤島運行，保障電力工作人員安全。JEAC 9701規定了具體檢測閾值和響應時間。

standards_or_laws: 電気事業法 施行規則

summary.en: GB/T 19964 and NB/T 32004 also require anti-islanding protection for grid-tied PV inverters, including both active and passive detection. However, the specific detection thresholds, response times, and validation test methods differ from JEAC 9701 requirements. Chinese standards primarily reference IEC 62116 for islanding test methodology.
summary.zh: GB/T 19964及NB/T 32004同样要求并网光伏逆变器具备防孤岛保护，包括主动式与被动式检测。但具体检测阈值、响应时间及验证测试方法与JEAC 9701存在差异。中国标准主要参照IEC 62116进行孤岛检测测试。
summary.zht: GB/T 19964及NB/T 32004同樣要求併網光伏逆變器具備防孤島保護，包括主動式與被動式檢測。但具體檢測閾值、響應時間及驗證測試方法與JEAC 9701存在差異。中國標準主要參照IEC 62116進行孤島檢測測試。

gap.en: Although both Japan and China mandate anti-islanding, the JEAC 9701 scheme requires the simultaneous use of both active and passive methods with Japan-specific detection thresholds and test protocols. An inverter passing IEC 62116 or GB/T tests may not satisfy JEAC 9701 thresholds. Full re-testing under JET protocols is required; Chinese test reports are not accepted as equivalence evidence.
gap.zh: 尽管中日均强制要求防孤岛保护，JEAC 9701要求同时使用主动与被动方式，并规定日本特定检测阈值和测试规程。通过IEC 62116或GB/T测试的逆变器未必满足JEAC 9701阈值要求。须在JET规程下重新测试，中国检测报告不作等效依据。
gap.zht: 儘管中日均強制要求防孤島保護，JEAC 9701要求同時使用主動與被動方式，並規定日本特定檢測閾值和測試規程。通過IEC 62116或GB/T測試的逆變器未必滿足JEAC 9701閾值要求。須在JET規程下重新測試，中國檢測報告不作等效依據。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory — both active and passive methods required under JEAC 9701; verified during JET certification
mandatory_status.cn: Mandatory under GB/T 19964 and NB/T 32004; test methodology differs from JEAC 9701

source.publisher: JET (Japan Electrical Safety & Environment Technology Laboratories)

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Anti-islanding compliance under Chinese standards (GB/T 19964 / IEC 62116) does not satisfy Japanese JEAC 9701 requirements. Inverters must be re-tested for both active and passive anti-islanding performance to Japanese thresholds as part of the JET certification process.
compliance_verdict.zh: 【仅供参考】符合中国标准（GB/T 19964 / IEC 62116）的防孤岛性能不满足日本JEAC 9701要求。逆变器须在JET认证流程中，按日本阈值重新测试主动式与被动式防孤岛性能。
compliance_verdict.zht: 【僅供參考】符合中國標準（GB/T 19964 / IEC 62116）的防孤島性能不滿足日本JEAC 9701要求。逆變器須在JET認證流程中，按日本閾值重新測試主動式與被動式防孤島性能。
